content: Commitment-device economics: StickK reports 78% goal success with money on the line vs 35% without; 644k contracts, $69M+ staked. Stakes = price of failure. Forfeit destination matters (charity/anti-charity/friend). Beeminder auto-charges on derail. Key product metrics for stakes apps: % pacts with active stake, avg stake size, forfeit/penalty rate, settlement completion rate, total $ at stake.
